name: mcp-obsidian-extended
description: Full-featured MCP server for Obsidian — 38 tools covering 100% of the Local REST API

api_key.title: Obsidian API Key
api_key.description: Found in Obsidian Settings → Local REST API → API Key

host.title: Obsidian Host
host.description: Hostname or IP where Obsidian is running

port.title: Obsidian Port
port.description: Port number for the Local REST API plugin

tool_mode.title: Tool Mode
tool_mode.description: granular = 38 individual tools. consolidated = 11 combined tools (saves tokens)

tool_preset.title: Tool Preset
tool_preset.description: full = all tools. read-only = no writes. minimal = essentials. safe = no deletes
